reasoning: Query asks for cherry blossom spots in Tohoku, explicitly not Tokyo. Tool fetches Akita spots, which is Tohoku — partially correct. Kakunodate (sakura_meisho_100) appears and is the key hit. However the query implies multi-prefecture Tohoku coverage, and the response is Akita-only. Many results (Lake Tazawa, Chokai, fireworks) are irrelevant to sakura.
missing_data: Other Tohoku prefectures for sakura (Iwate, Miyagi, Fukushima) not covered. Hirosaki Castle (Aomori, top-tier sakura) absent. Seasonal/bloom timing info missing.
improvement_hint: For Tohoku-wide sakura queries, retrieve sakura_meisho_100 spots across all 6 Tohoku prefectures, or use search_area with sakura kind filter and region constraint.

reasoning: Query asks for major Niigata sake breweries. Response uses get_local_specialty and returns 24 items including famous brands Koshi no Kanbai, Hakkaisan, Kubota with proper descriptions and Wikidata provenance. MAFF GI for Kurosaki Chamame is less relevant but not wrong. Core sake brands are well covered.
missing_data: Sake brewery visit/tour information absent. Hakutsuru, Yoshinogawa and other brands may be missing. No address/coordinates for brewery visits.
improvement_hint: Add a category filter or kind_tag for 'sake_brewery' to surface brewery venues; cross-link to get_spots for physical brewery visit locations.

reasoning: Query asks for ski resorts WITH hot springs in Hakuba. Response returns Hakuba spots including Happo-One ski resort (good), but no onsen/hot spring tagged spots appear. The data contains no thermal spring entries for Hakuba municipality. Museums and botanical gardens dominate non-ski results. The dual constraint (ski + onsen) is not addressed.
missing_data: Hakuba area onsen facilities (e.g. Mimizuku no Yu, Hakuba Hatsuneyu) not present. No entries tagged with onsen or hot_spring kinds in the results.
improvement_hint: Add onsen kind tagging to municipal scrape results for Hakuba; consider a combined kinds filter (ski_resort + onsen) or search_hybrid for compound queries.

reasoning: Query asks for best autumn foliage in Kansai region (multi-prefecture). Tool fetches Kyoto only. Many Kyoto spots are valid koyo locations (Sanzen-in, Nijojo), but Osaka (Minoo), Nara, Hyogo (Kobe), Shiga (Biwa lake) are absent. The Kansai scope is not met. Ine-no-funaya (seaside) has no koyo relevance.
missing_data: Osaka, Nara, Hyogo, Shiga koyo spots missing. No seasonal/foliage kind filter applied. Famous spots like Eikan-do, Tofuku-ji, Rurikoin not seen in truncated portion.
improvement_hint: For Kansai-region queries, expand to all Kansai prefectures (26, 27, 28, 29, 30); add foliage kind tags or semantic search for koyo.

reasoning: Query (Arabic) asks for famous cherry blossom spots in Kansai. Tool returns Nara spots. Mt. Yoshino appears first with sakura_meisho_100 and high prominence — excellent match. Nara Park also appears (famous for sakura). However Kansai scope is incomplete (no Osaka, Kyoto hits). The top result is directly on-intent.
missing_data: Osaka (Osaka Castle), Kyoto (Maruyama, Kiyomizu), Hyogo cherry blossom spots absent. Query is Kansai-wide, not just Nara.
improvement_hint: Recognize Kansai-wide requests and query multiple prefectures (26-30); filter by sakura_meisho_100 kind to surface dedicated cherry blossom spots first.

reasoning: Query specifically asks for remote Okinawa islands with beautiful stargazing. Tool returns general Okinawa spots: Nakagusuku Castle, Tamaudun (Naha), Shikina-en — none are remote islands or stargazing spots. Taketomi Island appears and has island kind but no stargazing tag. The core constraint (remote island, dark sky) is entirely unmet.
missing_data: Iriomote, Yonaguni, Miyako island dark-sky spots absent. No stargazing or dark-sky kind tags in corpus. Ishigaki island (recognized stargazing destination) not shown.
improvement_hint: Add dark_sky or stargazing kind tag; link to remote island spots in Okinawa (Yaeyama, Miyako groups). Consider semantic search for 星空 queries.

reasoning: Thai query asks for rural Hokkaido onsen lodging. Tool returns hotels including 4 confirmed hito-yu-kai onsen ryokans (Shiranai, Ginkonyu, Yugen Ryounkan, Wakoma-so) in rural locations across Hokkaido — directly on-intent. ANA Holiday Inn Sapporo is urban/off-target but appears at position 5. Core rural onsen ryokan results are good.
missing_data: Coordinates missing for hito-yu-kai entries — limits navigation. Municipality field null for most onsen properties. No English names for rural ryokans.
improvement_hint: Prioritize hito_yu_kai type results for rural onsen queries; geocode hito-yu-kai entries to enable map display and filter urban hotels from rural onsen results.

reasoning: Vietnamese query asks for Seto Inland Sea islands worth visiting. Tool returns Kagawa spots — Ritsurin Garden, Mannō Lake, Marugame Castle — none are islands. Seto Inland Sea islands (Naoshima, Shodoshima, Teshima) are absent. The island constraint is completely unmet. Only the geographic region (Kagawa) is correct.
missing_data: Naoshima (art island), Shodoshima, Teshima, Megijima, Ogijima — none present. Island kind filter not applied. Setouchi multi-prefecture scope (Hiroshima, Okayama, Hyogo) also not covered.
improvement_hint: For Seto Inland Sea island queries, filter by island kind across prefectures 33, 34, 37, 38; include art-island entries for Naoshima/Teshima if in corpus.

reasoning: Query asks for indigo dyeing workshops in Tokushima. Tool returns craft specialties: Awa Hon-ai Shijira Weave (indigo fabric — relevant), Otani Ware (ceramics — less relevant), Awa Washi (washi paper — tangentially relevant via indigo-dyed paper). The core indigo-dyeing workshop intent is partially addressed but no physical workshop/venue locations are returned.
missing_data: Physical indigo dyeing workshop venues (体験工房) not returned. Awaai dye house visit info absent. No workshop addresses, booking info, or experience-type entries.
improvement_hint: Add workshop/experience venue entries with kind tags like craft_workshop or taiken; link craft product records to physical visitor facilities in the same municipality.

reasoning: German query asks for Buddhist temples with shukubo accommodation on Mt. Koya. Tool returns get_hotels for Wakayama, surfacing numerous koyasan_shukubo entries (Annyoin, Ichijoin, Ekoin, Kitamuroin, Kumagaiji) — exactly what was requested. Each has phone, description, shukubo.net URL. Municipality is 高野町. Perfect alignment of tool, intent, and results.
missing_data: Coordinates missing for shukubo entries — limits map use. English names absent. Price range not included.
improvement_hint: Geocode koyasan_shukubo entries; add English name translations; include nightly rate range if available from source.

reasoning: Query asks for off-the-beaten-path samurai districts outside Kyoto. search_area returns 146 results with Shimane (武家屋敷 Tsuwano area), Fukui (Uchiyama family), Kakunodate (Akita), Chiran (Kagoshima) — all legitimate, diverse, non-Kyoto locations. Constraint 'outside Kyoto' is met. Good geographic diversity.
missing_data: Kitsuki (Oita) samurai streets, Hagi (Yamaguchi) not visible in truncated results. No walking-time or access info for less-known sites.
improvement_hint: Filter out or deprioritize generic 'buke_yashiki' museum types; boost preservation_district entries with heritage designations; add note distinguishing open-air districts from museum exhibits.

reasoning: Indonesian query asks for summer festivals in Akita. Tool returns get_festivals for Akita in Indonesian. Results include Kakunodate Festival, Tsuchizaki Shinmei Shrine Festival — valid Akita festivals. However none are specifically 'summer' (dates mostly null or ambiguous). The famous Kanto Festival (竿燈まつり, August, one of Japan's top 3) is absent from visible results. Only 3 items returned.
missing_data: Kanto Matsuri (竿燈まつり, Akita City, August) — most famous Akita summer festival — absent. Omagari Fireworks (August) shown in L2-06 but not here. Date filtering for summer not applied.
improvement_hint: Add Kanto Matsuri to Akita festival corpus; implement month/season filter in get_festivals; cross-reference get_spots hanabi/summer_festival kind entries.

reasoning: Korean query asks for small fishing port towns in the San'in region. Tool returns Shimane spots: Lake Shinji, Matsue Castle, Iwami Ginzan, Mt. Sanbe — none are fishing port towns. The fishing village constraint is entirely unmet. Shimane is San'in, but no coastal fishing village entries appear in results.
missing_data: Yunotsu (漁港町, Shimane), Kotoura (Tottori coastal), Tottori fishing villages absent. No port/fishing_village kind tags. Tottori (also San'in) not queried.
improvement_hint: Add fishing_port or fishing_village kind tags for coastal settlement scrapes; expand San'in to include Tottori; use semantic search for 漁港 queries.

reasoning: Query asks to experience washi paper making in Gifu. Tool returns craft specialties: 8 items. However the washi-specific item (Mino Washi, 美濃和紙) is not visible in the truncated 4000-char excerpt — Mino Ware (ceramics) and Hida Shunkei (lacquer) appear first. Washi (和紙) is in the corpus but may appear later. The query intent (hands-on washi experience) maps better to workshop venues than METI designation records.
missing_data: 美濃和紙 (Mino Washi) may be in the full result but not visible in truncation. Physical workshop locations (美濃和紙の里会館) absent. Experience/booking info missing.
improvement_hint: Re-rank craft results to show washi items first when query contains 和紙/washi; add washi_workshop kind for venue entries with experience programs.

reasoning: Spanish query asks for fishing villages on the Noto Peninsula. Tool returns Ishikawa spots dominated by Kanazawa Castle and Kenroku-en — flagship Kanazawa attractions, not Noto fishing villages. Nanao Castle appears (northern Ishikawa, closer to Noto). No fishing village or coastal community entries. Municipality filter for Noto area not applied.
missing_data: Wajima (輪島, lacquerware + fishing town), Sosogi coast, Suzu, Monzen — key Noto Peninsula fishing towns absent. No fishing_village or coastal kind entries.
improvement_hint: Add municipality-level filtering for Noto Peninsula municipalities (Wajima, Suzu, Noto-cho); add fishing_village kind; use semantic search for 漁村/fishing village queries.

reasoning: Query asks for lesser-known sand dunes outside Tottori. Response returns 90 matches including Tottori (expected), Onjuku Beach (Chiba), Ishikari dune museum (Hokkaido), Fukiagehama (Kagoshima), Tsujido Beach (Kanagawa). Geographic diversity is good. Constraint 'not just Tottori' is well served. Tottori still appears first but that is acceptable since query acknowledges it.
missing_data: Nakatajima (Hamamatsu) sand dunes, Uchimigahama (Miyazaki) not visible. Descriptions sparse for lesser-known dunes.
improvement_hint: Boost non-Tottori dune entries in ranking when query specifies 'beyond Tottori'; add short descriptions to dune spots without description_en.

reasoning: Chinese query asks for traditional crafts of the San'in region. Tool returns Shimane crafts in Chinese: Iwami Yaki (ceramics), Sekishu Washi (paper), Unshuu Soroban (abacus), Izumo Stone Lanterns — all METI-designated, all in Chinese. 4 items with high-quality translations and production area details. Excellent coverage of Shimane crafts.
missing_data: Tottori (also San'in) crafts not included — Inshuu Washi, Tottori mingei items absent. Query says 山阴 (San'in region = Shimane + Tottori).
improvement_hint: For San'in region queries, combine Shimane (32) and Tottori (31) craft results; add a region-level query parameter to get_local_specialty.

reasoning: Query asks for lavender fields in Hokkaido beyond Furano. Tool returns general Hokkaido spots: Showa-shinzan (volcano), Sapporo Clock Tower, Matsumae Castle, Daisetsuzan — none are lavender-related. No lavender or flower field entries present in Hokkaido corpus. The intent (lavender fields, non-Furano) is entirely unaddressed.
missing_data: Nakafurano, Tomita Farm (Furano), and alternative lavender spots like Sarobetsu Prairie, Date city flower fields absent. No lavender/flower_field kind tag in corpus.
improvement_hint: Add lavender/flower_garden kind tags; scrape Hokkaido flower farm pages for Biei, Nakafurano, Kami-Furano; add seasonal bloom calendar entries.

reasoning: Filipino query asks for traditional old towns in Kyushu. Tool returns Oita spots: Usa Jingū, Oka Castle, Kuju Mountains — religious/historic but not specifically 'traditional towns' (jokamachi/machiya districts). The query intent (traditional townscapes, historic streetscapes) is not met. Mameda-machi (Hita) appears in see_also but is cut off.
missing_data: Hita Mameda-machi, Usuki city (stone Buddhas + old town), Nakatsu castle town not visible. Yufuin (historic onsen town) absent. No preservation_district or jokamachi kind results for Oita.
improvement_hint: For 'traditional town' queries, filter by preservation_district and jokamachi kinds; Mameda-machi in see_also_wikidata_venues should be promoted to main results.

reasoning: Query asks for Hokuriku region (北陸) kominka lodging. Tool queries Ishikawa only. Results: 2 hito-yu-kai onsen ryokans (not kominka), 1 hostel named 'Student housing 1' (clearly irrelevant), AB Hotel (standard hotel). Bed and Craft kominka hotel in earlier Ishikawa spot results is not shown here. Query scope (北陸 = Ishikawa + Toyama + Fukui + Niigata) not met.
missing_data: Bed and Craft kominka network (seen in L2-20 Ishikawa spots but absent here), Toyama/Fukui kominka lodgings. 'Student housing 1' entry is noise. No kominka_stay filter applied.
improvement_hint: Add kominka_stay filter to get_hotels; expand to all Hokuriku prefectures (15, 16, 17, 18); remove or flag untagged OSM accommodation clusters with no name.

reasoning: Query asks for mountain shrines on the Kii Peninsula. Tool returns get_japan_heritage for Wakayama with excellent results: Kongobu-ji (Koya-san), Kumano Kodo, Kumano Sanzan, Negoro-ji — all directly relevant mountain/pilgrimage heritage. Tool_scope_note correctly guides agent to see_also for UNESCO/pilgrimage content. High-quality heritage data with coordinates, designations, and URLs.
missing_data: Nachi Taisha (individually), Hayatama Taisha not separately listed. Yoshino/Omine Mountains (Nara side of Kii) not included. Access info for mountain pilgrimage routes absent.
improvement_hint: Include Nara prefecture results for Kii Peninsula queries (Yoshino, Omine); list individual Kumano Sanzan shrines separately for deeper navigation.

reasoning: Query asks for summer fireworks festivals along the Sea of Japan coast. Tool returns Niigata festivals (129 items) including Nagaoka Fireworks (excellent — major Japan Sea coast hanabi). However many results are flower festivals (芝桜, ヒメサユリ) irrelevant to fireworks. Other Sea of Japan prefectures (Akita, Toyama, Ishikawa, Shimane) not included. Omagari Fireworks (Akita) omitted.
missing_data: Akita, Toyama, Ishikawa, Tottori/Shimane fireworks festivals absent. No hanabi kind filter applied. Nagaoka Fireworks is a key hit but buried among 129 unfiltered results.
improvement_hint: Filter get_festivals by hanabi/fireworks event type or kind; expand to all Sea of Japan coast prefectures; add region parameter for Sea of Japan (日本海) geographic concept.

reasoning: Query asks for traditional bamboo crafts in Oita. Tool returns get_local_specialty with 2 items: Hakata Weave (multi-prefecture including Oita, less targeted) and Beppu Bamboo Crafts (別府竹細工, exactly on-intent with full description, production area, METI designation). Beppu Bamboo Crafts is one of Japan's most famous bamboo craft designations. see_also includes relevant venues.
missing_data: Physical craft workshop locations in Beppu city not included. Beppu Craft Museum / workshop visit info absent. Only 2 items may be undersupplied if there are more Oita crafts.
improvement_hint: Cross-link craft designations to nearby workshop/museum venues via kind tags; add experience/workshop entries for Beppu bamboo craft facilities.

reasoning: Query asks for cycling routes through rural Shikoku. Tool returns Ehime spots. Ōmishima (大三島) with cycling_route kind is a direct hit (Shimanami Kaido). However many results are castles (Ōzu, Yuzuki, Uwajima) unrelated to cycling. Query specifies rural Shikoku multi-prefecture; only Ehime is covered. Shikoku cycling (Shimanto, Kochi, rural Tokushima) is absent.
missing_data: Shimanto River cycling (Kochi), Yoshino River cycling, Tokushima/Kagawa rural routes absent. No cycling_route kind filter applied. Multi-prefecture Shikoku not covered.
improvement_hint: Filter by cycling_route kind across all Shikoku prefectures (36, 37, 38, 39); Shimanami Kaido spans Ehime–Hiroshima so should note the cross-prefecture route.

reasoning: Query asks where to see kabuki outside Tokyo/Kyoto. Tool returns get_traditional_arts (183 items) starting with UNESCO entries: Bunraku, Kabuki (definition-level entry), Chakkirako, Dainichido Bugaku — these are art form descriptions, not performance venue locations. Kabuki appears as an art form but no regional kabuki theaters (Konpira, Chichibu, Iya) are listed. The tool retrieves the art form rather than the venue.
missing_data: Kompira Grand Theater (Kotohira, Kagawa — Japan's oldest kabuki stage), Chichibu Yomatsuri, Iya kabuki (Tokushima) venue entries absent. No venue/location dimension in traditional_arts results.
improvement_hint: Add performance venue kind tags (kabuki_theater, dengaku_stage) to spots; cross-reference traditional_arts with get_spots for venues that host kabuki performances; search_hybrid on 歌舞伎 may surface regional kabuki halls.
